name: Music Bot
description: A Telegram Music Player Bot, written in Python with Pyrogram and Py-Tgcalls.

BOT_TOKEN.description: A Bot's token from Botfather. Bot name/username are auto-detected from this token on startup.

MONGO_URL.description: Get a mongodb url from https://cloud.mongodb.com.

LOGGER_ID.description: Your log group ID, add your bot there and promote as an admin.

OWNER_ID.description: The user id of user whom you would like to add as OWNER.

SESSION.description: A Pyrogram v2 String Session from @StringFatherBot on Telegram.

SUPPORT_CHANNEL.description: Your support channel link (shown in bot menus). Optional.

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Your support group link (shown in bot menus). Optional.

GITHUB_REPO.description: Link to your bot's source repo (shown in the /start menu). Optional.

START_IMG.description: Direct image link used for the /start message. Optional.

PING_IMG.description: Direct image link used for /ping and /stats. Optional.

DEFAULT_THUMB.description: Fallback thumbnail image link if generation fails. Optional.
